_schema: Revelation scheduling — multi-step information reveals across chapters. Each revelation has a plant, hint chain, and full reveal. Queried by /forge-write to know which revelations to advance in each chapter.

revelations.revelation: The System is progressively binding Nate — Stage 1 through 4
revelations.notes: Narrator drops hints throughout. Nate won't understand until much later.

revelations.revelation: Flint serves the System first, Nate second — his friendship is genuine but constrained
revelations.notes: Flint's hesitations, the things he doesn't say. Narrator comments on what Flint withholds.

revelations.revelation: Nate has pre-System markers — his abilities aren't entirely System-granted
revelations.notes: The occupied space, his WIS stat, things that don't fit the System's model.

revelations.revelation: The Stag is a pre-System entity with its own agenda
revelations.notes: Brief sightings, Rex reacting to something unseen. Slow burn.

revelations.revelation: Sonja can perceive the spiritual layer — she sees what the System hides
The Integration affected the entire world — other nations, other creatures, other systems
revelations.notes: Interludes show the wider world. Nate is tunnel-visioned on survival.
